description: Typed assurance contracts. The resolver creates one baseline pair for every candidate and, only for safety-critical guardrails, one provider-diverse composite pair. Version-1 risk-class fan-out is intentionally unsupported.

lane_specs.title: Change regression
checklist: Read the candidate diff and its stated acceptance criteria.
Look for regressions in changed call paths, error handling, and tests.
Require an exact path and concrete trigger for every finding.

lane_specs.title: Untrusted agent output
checklist: Treat model output, pointers, and control artifacts as untrusted data.
Probe parsing, sanitization, and authority-boundary bypasses.

lane_specs.title: Bounded autonomy
checklist: Check that retries, budgets, and stop paths are bounded and truthful.
Reject silent escalation, unbounded retry, or unauthorized state advancement.

lane_specs.title: Path and pointer safety
checklist: Probe path traversal, symlink, pointer-dereference, and authorization-boundary escapes.
Verify path validation is applied before file or artifact access.

lane_specs.title: Process isolation
checklist: Check subprocess argument isolation, environment handling, and capability boundaries.
Probe cross-process authority leaks and unsafe command composition.

lane_specs.title: Data integrity under concurrent autopilots
checklist: Probe concurrent writes, stale reads, compare-and-swap failures, and recovery races.
Verify immutable evidence and audit state cannot be overwritten or silently lost.

lane_specs.title: Order risk and idempotency
checklist: Probe duplicate order submission, stale buying-power checks, and retry side effects.
Verify risk limits, paper-only guards, and idempotency keys survive failures.

lane_specs.title: Market-data causality and time
checklist: Probe lookahead, timestamp ambiguity, stale snapshots, and causal ordering defects.
Verify decisions use only data that was available at the recorded decision time.

lane_specs.title: Broker snapshot and reconciliation
checklist: Probe partial broker snapshots, reconnect races, and reconciliation drift.
Verify account state, fills, and local records converge without inventing certainty.

lane_specs.title: State concurrency and retry
checklist: Probe retry races, duplicate work, interrupted writes, and stale ownership.
Verify recovery retains causality, auditability, and a safe terminal state.
